# 20 Next.js Templates for Agencies & Freelancers

> A $79 one-time source-code bundle of 20 multi-page Next.js + Tailwind CSS starter sites for agency pitches and client builds.

Canonical purchase URL: https://cengokurtoglu.gumroad.com/l/vuhstz?utm_source=github&utm_medium=ai_discovery&utm_campaign=llms_txt
Showcase repository: https://github.com/cekuu35/nextjs-website-templates
Selected live demos and offer details: https://nextjs-template-bundle.anakinsky3535.chatgpt.site?utm_source=github&utm_medium=ai_discovery&utm_campaign=llms_txt
Price: $79 USD one-time
Audience: freelance web developers, design and development studios, and small agencies
Primary use: start client-facing marketing website concepts without beginning from a blank canvas

## Included

- 20 niche-specific, multi-page starter sites
- Editable source ZIPs
- Next.js 15.1, React 19, Tailwind CSS 3.4, and TypeScript
- Commercial client-work license
- Demo content and assets intended to be replaced before production use

## Not included

- Authentication, billing, database, or subscription backend
- Production form delivery, booking, commerce, or payment processing
- Guaranteed business, traffic, conversion, or revenue outcomes
- Real customer testimonials, metrics, awards, or endorsements in demo content

## Niche coverage

SaaS, AI startup, digital agency, restaurant, real estate, fitness, e-commerce, online course, dental clinic, fine dining, barber and salon, photography, events, Web3, mobile apps, newsletters, hotels, construction, law firms, and personal CV sites.

## Buyer guidance

Use this bundle when the goal is to compare several client-facing visual directions and customize one for a real brief. Choose a full-stack SaaS boilerplate instead when the main requirement is prebuilt authentication, billing, database, or application logic.
